Meanwhile, Weinstein’s retrial nears closing arguments in Manhattan, and New Englanders are still gripped by fear over 12 mysterious deaths some believe point to a serial killer. Tune in for all the details.  See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: Live Debut: Diddy Under Fire, Kohberger’s Alternate Suspect, and Karen Read’s Defense Begins
summary: Prosecutors must soon respond to Bryan Kohberger’s request to name an alternate suspect in the Idaho student murders, Sean “Diddy” Combs faces explosive racketeering charges after week three of testimony, and the defense begins laying out it's case in the Karen Read re-trial.
